additionalPlanContext: Add production-ready fixes to this Java 21 Maven WAR project running on Wicket 9.x + Jetty 9.4.x (javax only). 1) Fix UI styling issues caused by Content-Security-Policy blocking external stylesheets: update the Wicket WebApplication init() to configure CSP to allow loading stylesheets from 'self' and allow fonts; if Google Fonts is used, allow https://fonts.googleapis.com and https://fonts.gstatic.com. Ensure the browser no longer shows (blocked:csp) for /css/W3.css and /login_style.css. 2) Add production-grade DB connection pooling using HikariCP with Hibernate 5.x (javax). Add HikariCP dependency to pom.xml and configure Hibernate to use org.hibernate.hikaricp.internal.HikariCPConnectionProvider with sensible pool settings. HARD CONSTRAINTS: DO NOT migrate to Jakarta. Do NOT introduce any jakarta.* imports or dependencies. Keep Jetty 9.4.x and Wicket 9.x.
